entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the crop affected by rosette disease

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE DISEASE
entities.description: A virus disease of groundnut transmitted by aphids that reduces yield

entities.name: APHIS CRACCIVORA
entities.description: The aphid species that transmits groundnut rosette disease

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural output of the groundnut crop

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut lines to withstand groundnut rosette disease

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING TRIALS
entities.description: The process used to evaluate groundnut lines for resistance in the field

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the field screening trials were conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the field screening trials were conducted

entities.name: INFECTOR ROW TECHNIQUE
entities.description: The specific method used during field screening trials to evaluate resistance

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE ASSISTOR VIRUS
entities.description: A virus to which the rosette disease resistant lines were found to be susceptible

entities.name: INTEGRATED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to managing groundnut rosette disease
